smoke.detail: Box (rosenbluth) install + smoke, caches forced under /zfs (PIXI_CACHE_DIR/UV_CACHE_DIR/PIP_CACHE_DIR/HF_HOME/TMPDIR all /zfs/sanjanp/fto-admet-envs; nothing in $HOME, which is 97% full). `pixi install --manifest-path pixi.toml` solved the env on the box (detached tmux, polled). pixi.lock is box-solved (linux-64 platform sections, 106 sha256 hashes, NO osx section) and carries admet-ai 2.0.1 + chemprop v2 + torch (CUDA wheel) + rdkit 2025.9 + lightning; intent is minimal (python 3.12 + admet-ai>=2.0.1) and admet-ai's own pyproject pulls the exact companion stack. Direct smoke `pixi run --manifest-path pixi.toml python run.py --input tests/fixtures/fto43.smi --output ...` (CPU, no --gpu) => model=admet_ai, uncertainty=None, raw.columns has 104 entries (52 heads x value+percentile), endpoint_values has 50 promoted heads. F-17 verified LIVE: VDss_Lombardo and Half_Life_Obach are ABSENT from endpoint_values, present verbatim in raw.columns, and quarantined (with their percentile companions) in raw.excluded_r2_negative. Percentile companions kept out of endpoint_values. Classification heads are probabilities in [0,1] (hERG=0.006, BBB_Martins=0.896, Pgp_Broccatelli=0.0003). Clearance heads emitted (low-weight) and flagged in raw.head_flags (CLhep=17.66 uL/min/10^6 cells); PPBR_AZ=20.56 (% bound). Gate smoke `pixi run pytest tests/test_model_admet_ai.py -m model -q` (core env, shells into the model env like core.dispatch) => 1 passed in 11.78s.
smoke.detail_extra: GPU optional (requires_gpu=False): default run pins CPU via CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES='' set before torch import; --gpu N pins cuda:N. admet_ai model weights ship inside the wheel (no run-time download). chemprop/lightning print progress to stderr; run.py writes JSON only to --output so stdout/stderr noise never corrupts the collected record.

note: ADMET-AI v2 (Chemprop v2, retrained; v2 != v1 paper/web server) cross-cutting generalist: its registry endpoints set spans 10 endpoints, so run.py emits EVERY head (raw.columns verbatim: physchem, 3 alert counts, all classification heads incl. hERG/BBB_Martins/Pgp_Broccatelli/CYP/12 Tox21, regression heads, and each _drugbank_approved_percentile companion). endpoint_values promotes only usable heads: everything EXCEPT the two F-17 R2-negative heads (VDss_Lombardo R2=-1.21, Half_Life_Obach R2=-2.39, quarantined in raw.excluded_r2_negative) and the percentile companions. uncertainty=None per record (ADMET-AI has no native per-prediction uncertainty; the signal is INDIRECT cross-model spread at aggregation, CLAUDE.md §3) - the per-head weight/exclusion tags are metadata and live in raw.head_flags/raw.excluded_r2_negative, not the Uncertainty envelope. Clearance heads (Clearance_Hepatocyte_AZ uL/min/10^6 cells, Clearance_Microsome_AZ uL/min/mg) emitted low-weight and kept decomposed (F-3, never combine with PKSmart/OPERA/DruMAP clearance). LD50_Zhu=log(1/(mol/kg)), UP=more toxic, NOT comparable to ProTox mg/kg (F-5). F-16 standardization DEFERRED: adapter feeds the single canonical SMILES from core UNMODIFIED, flags that ADMET-AI has no desalting/protonation step so a neutralized FTO parent must be fed upstream; smoke confirmed on the documented placeholder fto43 fixture. Access CODE-PKG (MIT).
